name: Open Listening Ports (Windows)
description: Enumerate listening TCP/UDP ports, map to PIDs/processes, and flag unexpected services on Windows.
notes: Read-only enumeration of sockets and services.

tasks.name: Enumerate listening ports
tasks.description: Gather TCP/UDP listeners and highlight uncommon ports.

actions.name: Unexpected ports (exclude 22/80/443)
actions.description: Highlight listeners not on common ports.
actions.command: netstat -ano | findstr LISTENING | findstr /V ":22 " | findstr /V ":80 " | findstr /V ":443 " || echo No unexpected ports found

actions.name: Get-NetTCPConnection
actions.description: List TCP listeners with owning process.
actions.command: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess"

actions.name: Get-NetUDPEndpoint
actions.description: List UDP listeners with owning process.

actions.name: Map port to process
actions.description: Map listening ports to process names.
actions.command: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Process=$p.Name} }"
